allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); f=d['format']; s=[x for x in d['streams'] if x['codec_type']=='video'][0]; print\(f'Duration: {float\(f[\\"duration\\"]\):.1f}s | Resolution: {s[\\"width\\"]}x{s[\\"height\\"]} | FPS: {s[\\"r_frame_rate\\"]} | Size: {int\(f[\\"size\\"]\)//1024//1024}MB'\)")
